name: stage-it
description: Stage.it connects Codex to your Shopify store and turns your whole catalog into stunning editorial photos in seconds.

interface.shortDescription: Turn your whole Shopify catalog into stunning editorial photos in seconds.
interface.longDescription:
Stage.it connects Codex to your Shopify store and turns your whole catalog into stunning editorial photos in seconds.

Example:
Create 3 new photos of each product for the upcoming Thanksgiving season.

And voilà.
defaultPrompt: Create 3 new photos of each product for the upcoming Thanksgiving season.
